fallback_contact.name: James Melendez
fallback_contact.title: Operations Manager, Bobsled Construction
fallback_contact.rationale: James is the operational lead at Bobsled and the email is publicly listed on their team page — best direct contact. Bobsled is a design-build firm co-owned by Monteyne Architecture (founder/principal Tom Monteyne). They focus on multifamily/niche/tech projects (e.g., Granola Heights multifamily). Office: 194 Sherbrook St, Winnipeg, MB R3C 2B6. Phone: 204-947-3155.

needs_review_flags: Small design-build firm; estimating likely handled by James or Tom directly, no dedicated estimator title
Multifamily/architectural niche — paint scopes will be specified, design-driven
personalization_hooks: Design-build with Monteyne Architecture — appreciation for craft and finish quality matters; Ashrah's clean post-job process is a strong angle
Office on Sherbrook St — West End / Wolseley area
Recently completed Granola Heights multifamily — reference it as a tangible local project
James's email is public (james@bob-sled.ca) — direct outreach is easy

sources.claim: James Melendez Operations Manager / team listing
